The '''''Far Thunder''''' was one of the [[Republic-class cruiser|''Republic''-class cruisers]] that were introduced during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. ''Republic''-class vessels were cheap to produce, allowing large numbers to be brought into service.

The ship was first seen in action in the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]], under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. Along with nine other vessels, the ''Thunder'' ambushed a Yuuzhan Vong fleet believed to have [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] aboard. Although it turned out that Shimrra was elsewhere and the Republic forces had only killed a [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]], it was still considered a substantial victory.

''Far Thunder'' had sustained a good deal of damage during the fight, and its commander, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hannser]], argued that it should be repaired to preserve the [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems]] ship for future battles. He won his case, and the ship was given the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] ''[[Whip Hand]]'' as an escort. They were to rendezvous with a fleet tender, where the ship would undergo repairs. However, a small Yuuzhan Vong fighter carrier found the ships, and it launched approximately sixty [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] at them. The tender was [[Battle over Far Thunder|destroyed]], and ''Far Thunder'' was unable to defend itself adequately. Captain Hannser sent out a distress signal, which was answered by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ijix Harona]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]. The two squadron commanders agreed to go help the ship, and Jaina took her squadron of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] in first. The dogfight lasted for just under half an hour, and resulted in the destruction of most of the coralskippers, as well as the ''Far Thunder'' itself.
